title: prunus × lannesiana f. excelsa
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. excelsa, also known as the Chinese flowering cherry or Lannes cherry, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Prunus genus, a type of deciduous shrub or small tree. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. Its health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
